text: Hey, quick question, do u guys have like a student discount or something? If so, how do I get it?
The app keeps crashing when I try to upload my files, any idea why?
The software fails to launch on my new laptop. I've tried restarting but it still doesn't work.
I am experiencing an issue with my device connecting to the network. The problem seems to occur only during specific hours. Could you please assist me in diagnosing this?
I'm experiencing some issues with the app crashing unexpectedly. What should I do?
My game keeps crashing. Not sure if it's the update or my laptop, but also tried reinstalling and still no luck. By the way, I have a lot of other software running, like my music app.

I have a situation with my recent subscription, where I explicitly cancelled it, yet it was still charged this month. This seems like a mistake, and I’d really appreciate if you could look into the refund process for me, as it’s quite frustrating and I’m not sure what my next steps should be. Also, I think there might’ve been a glitch in your system because I was really careful about my cancellation and now I’m in a bit of a bind.
My app crashes every time I try to upload a photo, and I'm using the latest version. Also, I went to a concert last week, which was great.
I am unable to access my account, despite having reset my password. I was informed that my account was not locked, yet I continue to face this issue.

I recently purchased a blender that was on sale, but after using it, I realized it’s not functioning as expected. I followed all the instructions carefully, but it keeps shutting off unexpectedly. I really liked the design and was looking forward to using it regularly, but now I’m quite disappointed. Can I get a refund for this? Please let me know what steps I need to take to initiate the process, as I still have the original packaging and receipt, but am not entirely sure if that's enough.
I'm having trouble connecting to the server. It keeps timing out on every attempt. What can I do?
I ordered some shoes last week, the site said they'd arrive in two days, but it's been a week and I haven't seen anything. What's going on?

I am writing to request a refund for the item I purchased last month. Unfortunately, it arrived damaged and I have already attached the necessary photographs for your review. Please advise on the next steps, as I did not expect to encounter such issues.

I've been experiencing a persistent issue where the application refuses to load any of the images I try to access. I've checked my internet connection, and everything seems to be working fine. It appears to be a problem on the app's end, but I've already attempted several troubleshooting steps, including reinstalling the app and clearing the cache without any luck. Can you provide assistance on this matter as it is crucial for my daily tasks?

I'm having this really strange problem where I can't seem to access my account. I thought I remembered my email but now I’m not sure if I used a different one. Can you help clarify this situation? It's quite confusing because I feel like I’ve tried everything and nothing seems to work. Also, it’s possible I might have created a different account altogether, which adds to the uncertainty here.
I thought I changed my email address, but I still can't get the verification codes sent there.
